creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: Thanks! Looks like it may do the trick. Any hope of a commit to head before the next snapshot build on Oct. 1? As I have a new system to install it on. I will need a snapshot to try it out. Then I can get back to my REAL problems with a livelock that resulted in a totally mangled file system. Never seen an fsck dump so many files into lost+found. Died during installworld and I had almost 800 new files in lost+found!
